'''âd-n-th''' ('''kadanath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mod|mod]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mod|mod]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-n-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadanath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidanath|thidanath]] || [[word:jidanath|jidanath]] || [[word:shidanath|shidanath]] || [[word:kidanath|kidanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudanath|thuthudanath]] || [[word:jujudanath|jujudanath]] || [[word:shushudanath|shushudanath]] || [[word:kukudanath|kukudanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudanath|thudanath]] || [[word:judanath|judanath]] || [[word:shudanath|shudanath]] || [[word:kudanath|kudanath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudanath|thudanath]] || [[word:judanath|judanath]] || [[word:shudanath|shudanath]] || [[word:kudanath|kudanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedanath|thedanath]] || [[word:jedanath|jedanath]] || [[word:shedanath|shedanath]] || [[word:kedanath|kedanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodanath|thothodanath]] || [[word:jojodanath|jojodanath]] || [[word:shoshodanath|shoshodanath]] || [[word:kokodanath|kokodanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodanath|thodanath]] || [[word:jodanath|jodanath]] || [[word:shodanath|shodanath]] || [[word:kodanath|kodanath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodanath|thodanath]] || [[word:jodanath|jodanath]] || [[word:shodanath|shodanath]] || [[word:kodanath|kodanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdanath|thĂŠdanath]] || [[word:jĂŠdanath|jĂŠdanath]] || [[word:shĂŠdanath|shĂŠdanath]] || [[word:kĂŠdanath|kĂŠdanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadanath|thathadanath]] || [[word:jajadanath|jajadanath]] || [[word:shashadanath|shashadanath]] || [[word:kakadanath|kakadanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadanath|thadanath]] || [[word:jadanath|jadanath]] || [[word:shadanath|shadanath]] || [[word:kadanath|kadanath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadanath|thadanath]] || [[word:jadanath|jadanath]] || [[word:shadanath|shadanath]] || [[word:kadanath|kadanath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadanath|shadanath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadanath|goshadanath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadanath|gokishadanath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadanathnĂŒ|shadanathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadanathnknĂŒ|goshadanathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanathnĂŒ|gokishadanathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadanathshĂ«|shadanathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadanathnkshĂ«|goshadanathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadanathshĂ«|gokishadanathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanathro|shadanathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanathnkro|goshadanathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanathro|gokishadanathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanathmu|shadanathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanathnkmu|goshadanathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanathmu|gokishadanathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadanathsher|shadanathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadanathnksher|goshadanathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadanathsher|gokishadanathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadanathng|shadanathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadanathnkng|goshadanathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadanathng|gokishadanathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadanathya|shadanathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadanathnkya|goshadanathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadanathya|gokishadanathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadanathyam|shadanathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadanathnkyam|goshadanathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadanathyam|gokishadanathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadanathnĂŒshĂ«|shadanathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadanathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadanathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadanathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadanathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanathnĂŒro|shadanathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanathnknĂŒro|goshadanathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanathnĂŒro|gokishadanathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanathnĂŒmu|shadanathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanathnknĂŒmu|goshadanathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanathnĂŒmu|gokishadanathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadanathshĂ«nĂŒ|shadanathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadanathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadanathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadanathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanathshĂ«ro|shadanathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanathnkshĂ«ro|goshadanathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanathshĂ«ro|gokishadanathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanathshĂ«mu|shadanathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanathnkshĂ«mu|goshadanathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanathshĂ«mu|gokishadanathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadanathronĂŒ|shadanathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadanathnkronĂŒ|goshadanathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanathronĂŒ|gokishadanathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadanathroshĂ«|shadanathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadanathnkroshĂ«|goshadanathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadanathroshĂ«|gokishadanathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadanathromu|shadanathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadanathnkromu|goshadanathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadanathromu|gokishadanathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadanathmunĂŒ|shadanathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadanathnkmunĂŒ|goshadanathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadanathmunĂŒ|gokishadanathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadanathmushĂ«|shadanathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadanathnkmushĂ«|goshadanathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadanathmushĂ«|gokishadanathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadanathmuro|shadanathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadanathnkmuro|goshadanathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadanathmuro|gokishadanathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
